title: Update PWA app icon to fire-and-ice tiger illustration

requirements.summary: Replace existing PWA app icons with new fire-and-ice dual tiger design
acceptanceCriteria: Two PNG icon files are generated: icon-192x192.png and icon-512x512.png featuring the fire-and-ice dual tiger design
Icons are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ or the existing icon asset path used by the PWA manifest
frontend/public/manifest.json icon entries point to the new icon files
frontend/index.html favicon and apple-touch-icon references are updated to use the new icon

file_operations.description: Update the icons array to reference the newly generated fire-and-ice tiger icon files. Change icon src paths from current generated icon assets to frontend/public/assets/generated/app-icon-192.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/app-icon-512.dim_512x512.png while preserving sizes and type fields.

Update favicon and apple-touch-icon link elements to reference the new fire-and-ice tiger icon. Change the favicon href to ./assets/generated/app-icon-192.dim_192x192.png and apple-touch-icon href to ./assets/generated/app-icon-512.dim_512x512.png to match the newly generated PWA icon files.
